class.name: GKGameActivity
class.brief_description: Represents an active Game Activity session.
class.description: Wraps [code skip-lint]GKGameActivity[/code], including lifecycle control, matching helpers, and score/achievement progress APIs.

method.name: check_pending_game_activity_existence
method.description: Checks whether a pending game activity exists.

method.name: create_with_definition
method.description: Creates an activity object from [param definition].

method.name: end
method.description: Ends this activity.

method.name: find_match
method.description: Finds a realtime [GKMatch] for this activity.

method.name: find_players_for_hosted_match
method.description: Finds players for a hosted-match flow.

method.name: get_progress_on_achievement
method.description: Returns progress percentage for [param achievement].

method.name: get_score_on_leaderboard
method.description: Gets this activity's score entry for [param leaderboard].

method.name: is_valid_party_code
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param partyCode] is valid.

method.name: make_match_request
method.description: Creates a [GKMatchRequest] based on this activity.

method.name: pause
method.description: Pauses this activity.

method.name: remove_achievements
method.description: Removes the given achievements from this activity.

method.name: remove_scores_from_leaderboards
method.description: Removes scores from the specified leaderboards.

method.name: resume
method.description: Resumes a paused activity.

method.name: set_achievement_completed
method.description: Marks [param achievement] as completed.

method.name: set_progress_on_achievement
method.description: Sets progress on [param achievement] to [param percentComplete].

method.name: set_score_on_leaderboard
method.description: Sets [param score] on [param leaderboard].

method.name: set_score_on_leaderboard_with_context
method.description: Sets [param score] and [param context] on [param leaderboard].

method.name: start
method.description: Starts this activity.

method.name: start_with_definition
method.description: Starts an activity from [param definition].

method.name: start_with_definition_and_party_code
method.description: Starts an activity from [param definition] and [param partyCode].

method.name: valid_party_code_alphabet
method.description: Returns valid characters for Game Activity party codes.

members.member: Definition used to create/configure this activity.
End timestamp (Unix seconds), or [code]0[/code] while active.
Leaderboard scores associated with this activity.
Party code for joining this activity.
Party URL for this activity, if available.
Custom properties attached to this activity.
